purpose: Reusable block functions for generating product display pages with tabs, configurator sections, metafields, and cart-like selection behavior.

rag_usage.call_contract: Import ctcm_blocks.py, call get_block_manifest() for metadata, collect missing required inputs, then call block functions by name with a shared context dictionary.

blocks.name: site_shell
blocks.summary: Creates the complete index.html shell and injects assembled page sections.
blocks.source_concept: BigCommerce product template wrapper and product view layout.

blocks.name: base_styles
blocks.summary: Provides CSS for the product display page, configurator, tabs, metafields, and responsive layout.
blocks.source_concept: Custom SCSS from product configurator, product metafields, and Cornerstone product view.

blocks.name: base_interactions
blocks.summary: Provides JavaScript for tabs, configurator quantity controls, summaries, metafield variant switching, and demo cart messages.

blocks.name: product_hero
blocks.summary: Renders the main product title, price, description, image, and call-to-action area.
blocks.source_concept: Cornerstone product-view product details and add-to-cart form.

inputs.name: product_image
inputs.prompt: Product image URL or local path

blocks.name: custom_field_tabs
blocks.summary: Turns named content groups into product information tabs.

blocks.name: configurator
blocks.summary: Renders collapsible product-selection categories with quantities, totals, and an add-selected action.
blocks.source_concept: --Category custom field configurator, GraphQL product fetch result, and cart collector.

inputs.name: configurator_categories
inputs.prompt: Configurator categories with product option text, prices, variant labels, and optional item image URLs/paths

blocks.name: metafields_panel
blocks.summary: Displays base product metafields and optional variant-specific metafields.
blocks.source_concept: Product and variant metafield GraphQL rendering.
